examples.title: Algorithm: Simple Escrow Contract
examples.code:
ALGORITHM SimpleEscrow
INPUT: buyer, seller, arbiter
OUTPUT: funds transfer

BEGIN
 IF buyer calls releaseFundsToSeller THEN
 transfer funds to seller
 ELSE IF seller calls refundBuyer THEN
 transfer funds to buyer
 END IF
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates a simple escrow contract algorithm. It takes buyer, seller, and arbiter as inputs and outputs a funds transfer based on the conditions.

examples.title: Python: Escrow Contract
examples.description: A simplified escrow contract in Python
examples.explanation: This Python code demonstrates a simple escrow contract. It allows the buyer to release funds to the seller or the seller to refund the buyer.
